other_observers: Steve Brown; We captured the bird, no one else saw it to my knowledge
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch Holmes Grove banding station
description: A bird was captured for banding. We noticed that is was a large greenish Empidonax flycatcher with a fine, nearly complete eyring. The bill was wide and long for an empid and was bright orange below. The overall green color and dark-centered feathers of the crown made me think this was an ALFL. Also the contrastingly clean throat (whitish). MEasurements were performed and all but one lined up with ALFL and not Willow Flycatcher the only other possibility.  See other species seperated categoryBehaviors: none noted as bird was capturedCall: none notedPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Steve Brown, Steve Brown, Steve Brown
